scripts.test:e2e: docker compose -f compose.test.yml down -v; docker compose -f compose.test.yml up -d --build --wait && npx tsx e2e/setup-test-user.ts && npx playwright test; docker compose -f compose.test.yml down
scripts.test:e2e:ui: docker compose -f compose.test.yml down -v; docker compose -f compose.test.yml up -d --build --wait && npx tsx e2e/setup-test-user.ts && npx playwright test --ui; docker compose -f compose.test.yml down
scripts.test:e2e:setup: docker compose -f compose.test.yml down -v; docker compose -f compose.test.yml up -d --build --wait && npx tsx e2e/setup-test-user.ts
